# Brownfield Migration Spec — a payments and statements application on WebSphere 9

## Application Summary
a payments and statements application on WebSphere 9

## Modernization Scope
all three integrations are in scope

## Integration Inventory

### Integration: INT-001 — Statement retrieval API
- **Technology + version:** JAX-RS on WebSphere 9
- **Integration type:** sync api
- **Data flow direction:** read-only
- **Criticality:** high
- **Coexistence constraint:** dual-read
- **API surface / contract:** OpenAPI 3.0 documented
- **State management:** stateless
- **Data volume + SLA:** 3M calls/day p95 < 300ms
- **Target intent:** Spring Boot API on ECS
<!-- confidence 1.00 (filled 8/8) -->

### Integration: INT-002 — Statement PDF rendering
- **Technology + version:** Batch renderer on WebSphere 9
- **Integration type:** batch
- **Data flow direction:** write-only
- **Criticality:** medium
- **Coexistence constraint:** dual-write
- **API surface / contract:** internal jobs
- **State management:** stateless
- **Data volume + SLA:** nightly 2M statements batch SLA 6h
- **Target intent:** AWS Batch on Fargate
<!-- confidence 1.00 (filled 8/8) -->

### Integration: INT-003 — Payment posting and fraud
- **Technology + version:** Apigee client v1 cross-cloud
- **Integration type:** async messaging
- **Data flow direction:** write-only
- **Criticality:** critical
- **Coexistence constraint:** dual-write
- **API surface / contract:** message contract documented
- **State management:** stateless
- **Data volume + SLA:** 900K postings/day
- **Target intent:** AWS SQS + Apigee cross-cloud
<!-- confidence 1.00 (filled 8/8) -->

## Non-Functional Requirements (Application-Wide)
- recovery point objective of 5 minutes and recovery time objective of 30 minutes
